reasoning:

The statistical trend analysis from FRED indicates a clear negative drift and outputs a combined estimate of a 30% probability that the value will exceed the recent 1.608 benchmark by the first resolution date. I am anchoring on this 30% estimate for the near-term date.

As the forecast horizon increases, the standard deviation of possible paths widens, drawing the probability closer to 50% for the second resolution date (February 2026).
